title: PlannerTask
description: Represents a Planner task in Microsoft 365. A task is contained in a plan and can be assigned to a bucket within the plan.

@odata.etag.description: The ETag of the resource, used for concurrency control

id.description: The unique identifier for the task. 28 characters long and case-sensitive.

planId.description: Plan ID to which the task belongs

bucketId.description: Bucket ID to which the task belongs. The bucket must be in the same plan as the task. 28 characters long and case-sensitive.

priority.description: Priority of the task. Valid range is 0-10 where 0 is highest priority. Values 0-1 are urgent, 2-4 are important, 5-7 are medium, 8-10 are low.

percentComplete.description: Percentage of task completion. When set to 100, the task is considered completed.

startDateTime.description: Date and time at which the task starts. ISO 8601 format, always in UTC.

dueDateTime.description: Date and time at which the task is due. ISO 8601 format, always in UTC.

completedDateTime.description: Date and time at which the percentComplete was set to 100. ISO 8601 format, always in UTC.

createdDateTime.description: Date and time at which the task was created. ISO 8601 format, always in UTC.

hasDescription.description: Indicates whether the details object of the task has a nonempty description.

conversationThreadId.description: Thread ID of the conversation on the task in the containing group.

orderHint.description: Hint used to order items of this type in a list view

assigneePriority.description: Hint used to order items of this type when grouped by assignee

previewType.description: The type of preview that shows on the task

checklistItemCount.description: Total number of checklist items on the task

referenceCount.description: Number of external references on the task
